title: Madonna's Missing Coachella Outfit
summary: Madonna, a famous singer, lost some special clothes she wore at the Coachella music festival. She wore a purple jacket, corset, and dress during a surprise performance with Sabrina Carpenter. Madonna is offering a reward to get them back because they are important to her history. She wore similar clothes at Coachella 20 years ago, making it a meaningful moment. The police think the clothes might have fallen off a golf cart and were not stolen. Madonna hopes someone will find and return them.

background_read: Madonna is a famous singer known as the Queen of Pop. Coachella is a large music festival held in California every year. Sabrina Carpenter is a younger singer who sometimes performs with other artists. Vintage clothes are old items that are special because of their history. A reward is a prize offered to encourage people to help find lost things.
Article_Structure: WHO: Madonna, a famous singer, and Sabrina Carpenter, another singer
WHAT: Madonna lost special clothes she wore at Coachella and is offering a reward to get them back
WHERE: At the Coachella music festival in California
WHY: The clothes are important to Madonna's history and she wants them returned

perspectives.description: Madonna is sad about losing her special clothes and hopes someone will return them for a reward.
